channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 'Had No Knowledge': Gulf Leaders On Trump's Claim Of Stopping Iran Attack

media:content.media:description: Officials from some Gulf nations said they had "no knowledge" of any US military plan

item.description: Trump had said on Monday that he decided to "hold off" on striking Iran after leaders from Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates appealed for more time for diplomacy.
item.content:encoded: Trump had said on Monday that he decided to "hold off" on striking Iran after leaders from Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates appealed for more time for diplomacy.

item.title: US-Nigeria Joint Strikes Kill 175 ISIS Terrorists, Says Nigerian Army

media:content.media:description: The joint strikes have resulted in the destruction of ISIS checkpoints, said Nigeria

item.description: The Nigerian military said Tuesday that joint airstrikes it launched with US forces at the weekend have killed 175 jihadists from the Islamic State group in Nigeria, including the group's global second-in -command.
item.content:encoded: The Nigerian military said Tuesday that joint airstrikes it launched with US forces at the weekend have killed 175 jihadists from the Islamic State group in Nigeria, including the group's global second-in -command.

item.title: Pakistani Officer Claims 2 Indian Airbases Were Hit. They Don't Exist

media:content.media:description: Pakistani military used the Fatah-1 guided artillery rocket during the offensive

item.description: On May 10, 2025, the Pakistani military also used the Fatah-1 guided artillery rocket during the cross-border offensive. However, that was successfully intercepted and destroyed mid-air by India's air defence network over Sirsa, Haryana.
item.content:encoded: On May 10, 2025, the Pakistani military also used the Fatah-1 guided artillery rocket during the cross-border offensive. However, that was successfully intercepted and destroyed mid-air by India's air defence network over Sirsa, Haryana.

item.title: PM Modi Arrives In Italy, To Meet Giorgia Meloni Today

media:content.media:description: PM Modi had visited Italy to participate in the G7 Summit in June 2024.

item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday (local time) arrived in Italy's capital, Rome, as part of the last leg of his five-nation tour.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1101637/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Tuesday (local time) arrived in Italy's capital, Rome, as part of the last leg of his five-nation tour.

item.title: Days After Trump's China Trip, Putin Arrives In Beijing For State Visit

media:content.media:description: Since President Xi assumed office in 2012, the two leaders have met on dozens of occasions.

item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin landed in the Chinese capital on Tuesday night to begin a high-profile two-day state visit, marking his arrival just days after his US counterpart Donald Trump wrapped up the high-stakes deliberations in China.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1101634/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Russian President Vladimir Putin landed in the Chinese capital on Tuesday night to begin a high-profile two-day state visit, marking his arrival just days after his US counterpart Donald Trump wrapped up the high-stakes deliberations in China.

item.title: US Secretary Of State Marco Rubio To Visit India From May 23-26

media:content.media:description: The Secretary will discuss energy, security, trade, and defence cooperation

item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio will undertake a four-day visit to India beginning May 23 to further cooperation in the fields of trade, defence and energy.
item.content:encoded: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio will undertake a four-day visit to India beginning May 23 to further cooperation in the fields of trade, defence and energy.

item.title: Chilling Video Shows US Cargo Jet's Engine Tearing Off Seconds Before Deadly Crash That Killed 15

media:content.media:description: The cargo jet was headed to Honolulu when disaster struck moments after rotation.

item.description: Investigators said the engine detached violently, erupting into a fireball as debris scattered across the airport perimeter and nearby industrial areas.
item.content:encoded: Investigators said the engine detached violently, erupting into a fireball as debris scattered across the airport perimeter and nearby industrial areas.

item.title: Norway Reports Europe's 1st Case Of Bird Flu In A Polar Bear

media:content.media:description: The H5N5 variant of the virus was detected in samples taken from a male bear

item.description: Norwegian authorities on Tuesday announced that avian influenza has been documented in a polar bear for the first time in Europe, in the Svalbard region in the Arctic.
item.content:encoded: Norwegian authorities on Tuesday announced that avian influenza has been documented in a polar bear for the first time in Europe, in the Svalbard region in the Arctic.

item.title: A Reservation Policy Collapsed. One Student Spent 9 Years Paying The Price

media:content.media:description: In court, Mumbai University's lawyer appeared only after the petition was filed, Sayyad claimed.

item.description: Around him are engineers, some junior to him in experience, some once his classmates in Maharashtra. But for nearly nine years, Sayyad says, he could not officially call himself one.
item.content:encoded: Around him are engineers, some junior to him in experience, some once his classmates in Maharashtra. But for nearly nine years, Sayyad says, he could not officially call himself one.

item.title: "Two-Three Days, Early Next Week": Trump's Timeline For Fresh Iran Attack

media:content.media:description: The Republican leader said that Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon because they would use it

item.description: The comment follows Trump's recent statement on Sunday that "the clock is ticking" for Iran to accept a peace deal with the United States and "there won't be anything left of them" if Tehran's leaders don't "get moving, FAST".
item.content:encoded: The comment follows Trump's recent statement on Sunday that "the clock is ticking" for Iran to accept a peace deal with the United States and "there won't be anything left of them" if Tehran's leaders don't "get moving, FAST".

item.title: OpenAI Founding Member Andrej Karpathy Joins Anthropic

media:content.media:description: Andrej Karpathy played a key role in developing Tesla's self-driving before leaving the firm in 2022

item.description: Former Tesla AI executive and one of OpenAI's founding members Andrej Karpathy has joined Anthropic, he said on Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: Former Tesla AI executive and one of OpenAI's founding members Andrej Karpathy has joined Anthropic, he said on Tuesday.

item.title: US Iran War News Live Updates: Trump Holds Off Iran Attack Planned For Tuesday After Gulf Intervention
item.description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

item.title: South African Student Sets World Record With 47 Splits In One Minute

media:content.media:description: Chaz Wilson achieved the most splits in one minute in male category.

item.description: He was inspired to attempt this record title after seeing Liberty Barros set the record at 42 in 2024 for the female title.
item.content:encoded: He was inspired to attempt this record title after seeing Liberty Barros set the record at 42 in 2024 for the female title.

item.title: PM Modi Leaves For Italy After Norway Visit, India-Nordic Summit

media:content.media:description: PM Modi is visiting Italy on the invitation of his Italian counterpart Giorgia Meloni.

item.description: During his two-day visit, PM Modi held separate talks with his counterparts, Norway Prime Minister Store, Iceland Prime Minister Kristrun Frostadottir, Finland Prime Minister Petteri Orpo and Denmark Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen.
item.content:encoded: During his two-day visit, PM Modi held separate talks with his counterparts, Norway Prime Minister Store, Iceland Prime Minister Kristrun Frostadottir, Finland Prime Minister Petteri Orpo and Denmark Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen.

item.title: Spanish Court Sets $1 Million Bail For Mango Founder's Son In Murder Inquiry

media:content.media:description: Jonathan Andic was also ordered to surrender his passport

item.description: The eldest son of Mango clothing empire founder Isak Andic paid one million euros (1.1 million dollars) in bail after he was arrested as part of a murder inquiry into his father's 2024 death, a court said Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: The eldest son of Mango clothing empire founder Isak Andic paid one million euros (1.1 million dollars) in bail after he was arrested as part of a murder inquiry into his father's 2024 death, a court said Tuesday.

item.title: NATO Discussing Deploying Troops In Hormuz If It Isn't Opened By July: Report

media:content.media:description: The idea has support from several members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organisation

item.description: The idea has support from several members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organisation, but doesn't yet have the necessary unanimous support, said a diplomat from a NATO country.
item.content:encoded: The idea has support from several members of the North Atlantic Treaty Organisation, but doesn't yet have the necessary unanimous support, said a diplomat from a NATO country.

item.title: Democracy, Rule Of Law Make Us "Natural Partners": PM Modi At Nordic Summit

media:content.media:description: PM Modi reached the Norwegian capital on Monday.

item.description: The Prime Minister expressed his appreciation for the collective diplomatic efforts, warmly thanking the host nation and greeting his European counterparts.
item.content:encoded: The Prime Minister expressed his appreciation for the collective diplomatic efforts, warmly thanking the host nation and greeting his European counterparts.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Xi Is Truly Done Falling For The Great American Bluff
item.description: The Chinese and others have long sized up Trump. As a person, he does not inspire trust. His transactional approach, erratic behaviour, ego-driven approach, brutal pressure tactics make him an unreliable interlocutor.
item.content:encoded: The Chinese and others have long sized up Trump. As a person, he does not inspire trust. His transactional approach, erratic behaviour, ego-driven approach, brutal pressure tactics make him an unreliable interlocutor.

item.title: Amid Surgery, Prosthetic Claims, Iran Says Mojtaba Has 'Scratch Behind Ear'

media:content.media:description: Earlier this month, a report by the New York Times stated that Mojtaba is "gravely wounded"

item.description: In Iran's first comment on Khamenei's injuries, Fars News, the country's semi-official news agency, said that the Supreme Leader was "in full health".
item.content:encoded: In Iran's first comment on Khamenei's injuries, Fars News, the country's semi-official news agency, said that the Supreme Leader was "in full health".
